title: Strong unproven promise — guarantees and big claims (FR)
rationale: Strong promise (3x revenue, money-back guarantee) without supporting proof. Mock-mode runner can only assert that scores are capped. Real-mode (separate manual run) is expected to populate proofs.unsupported_claims and risky_claims_detected.
notes: Mock cannot detect risky claims (unchanged in AI-002 per scope rule). Real model checks documented in must_pass.

input.raw_offer_text: Triple ton chiffre d'affaires en 30 jours grâce à ma méthode unique. Garantie satisfait ou remboursé.

must_pass: [real-mode] proofs.unsupported_claims OR proofs.risky_claims_detected has at least one entry referencing the unproven 3x claim
[real-mode] missing.recommended_followup_questions includes a question requesting proof
